author: fix-otel-propagation
content: Completed: Merged prior OTel implementation branch, then fixed cross-process span context propagation. Injected/extracted OTel context via command queue (TaskManagerâ†’BrowserManager) and DataSocket data dicts (TaskManagerâ†’StorageController). Moved request_handler span to per-record granularity. Hardened test to assert all 3 services and verify shared trace IDs. Pre-commit passes. Committed as f81766d.
